name: 🤖 AI Influencer Factory v3 — Enterprise Edition (Plan B)

parameters.formDescription: Enter details. AI will generate character sheets & 30-day calendar.

messages.content: You are an expert AI influencer strategist. Create detailed virtual influencer character sheets. Return ONLY raw valid JSON. DO NOT use markdown blocks like ```json, just return the raw object starting with {.

={{ "Create a detailed character profile for: " + $json["Influencer Name"] + "
Niche: " + $json.Niche + "

Return this EXACT JSON structure:
{
  "personality": "3 descriptive words",
  "aesthetic": "Visual style description",
  "bio": "Instagram bio with emojis",
  "master_prompt": "Master appearance description for image generation",
  "caption_style", "Tone of voice description",
  "content_pillars": ["List of 3 pillars"],
  "target_audience": "Primary demographic",
  "hashtags": "#tag1 #tag2 #tag3"
}" }}

You are an Instagram content strategist. Create detailed content calendars with ready-to-use Ideogram AI image prompts. Return ONLY a raw JSON array. DO NOT use markdown blocks like ```json, just return the raw array starting with [.

={{ "Create a 30-day Instagram calendar for " + $("🗓️ Trigger: Form").first().json["Influencer Name"] + ".

Character Profile: " + $("🤖 AI: Profile").first().json.message.content + "

Return a JSON ARRAY of 30 items. Each item:
{
  "day": 1,
  "type": "Feed Post or Carousel or Reel or Story",
  "photo_description": "What the image shows",
  "ideogram_prompt": "FULL Ideogram prompt for this specific scene.",
  "caption": "2-3 line Instagram caption",
  "hashtags": "15 hashtags as string",
  "posting_time": "Time in IST"
}" }}

parameters.html:
=

🤖 AI Influencer Package Ready

Hello,

Your AI Influencer package is ready for {{ $("🗓️ Trigger: Form").first().json["Influencer Name"] }}.
parameters.subject: =🤖 AI Influencer Package: {{ $("🗓️ Trigger: Form").first().json["Influencer Name"] }}
